scripts.dev: npm run build -w @plinko-v2/shared && concurrently -k -n shared,be,fe -c gray,cyan,magenta "npm run dev:watch -w @plinko-v2/shared" "npm run dev -w @plinko-v2/backend" "npm run dev -w @plinko-v2/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @plinko-v2/shared && npm run build -w @plinko-v2/backend && npm run build -w @plinko-v2/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @plinko-v2/frontend --if-present && npm run test -w @plinko-v2/backend --if-present
